outlook.summary: Spot at 6591.25 caught between massive 6900 CALL WALL (87K OI) and multi-expiry PUT confluence at 6600. 0DTE Max Pain at 6800 creates upward magnetic pull. Reverse smirk in 0DTE suggests bullish bias, but heavy PUT OI (PCR 2.18-2.80) across longer expiries indicates hedging pressure. 6500 PUT shows extreme volume anomaly (79K vol vs 10K OI = 7.9x ratio) - institutional accumulation detected. Watch 6600 as critical pivot; break below targets 6500, break above targets 6800 Max Pain.
